title: When Did You Last
questions: When did you last cry?
When did you last feel really, really angry?
When did you last forget to do something?
When did you last have a fight with someone?
When did you last do something that made you very happy?
When did you last feel positive about Earth's future?
When did you last get a real letter written by a real person?
When did you last receive some bad news?
When did you last change your plans for your life?
When did you last get lost?
When did you last you say no?
When did you last you hurt yourself?
When did you last you think to yourself, 'never again'?
When did you last feel on top of the world?
When did you last tidy your room / your desk?
When did you last shout at somebody?
When did you last have a problem with your computer?
When did you last have a perfect day?
When did you last you say sorry?
When did you last bump into an old friend?
